source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/15_규격 Test/4. [A1417MCW, F1417MCW] EN 60601-1-2 Test report (4.1).pdf

document.title: IEC 60601-1-2 Medical electrical equipment - Part 1-2 Test Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Nemko Korea EMC test report NK-22-E-0810 for H&abyz F1417MCW and A1417MCW digital flat panel X-ray detectors under IEC 60601-1-2.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory design verification evidence for electromagnetic emissions and immunity compliance of the tested digital flat panel X-ray detector models.
keyPoints: The report date of issue is 2022-10-04 and the testing laboratory is Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.
The test item is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model/type references F1417MCW and A1417MCW.
The model F1417MCW was tested as the representative model.
The intended environment is professional healthcare facility environment.
The intended use excludes mammography and direct cardiac application.

concepts.name: IEC 60601-1-2 EMC compliance
concepts.evidence: The product fulfils the requirements of IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015 IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020 and EN 60601-1-2:2015/A1:2021.

concepts.name: Professional healthcare facility environment
concepts.evidence: Intended ENVIRONMENT Professional healthcare facility environment.

concepts.name: Basic safety and essential performance monitoring
concepts.evidence: Description of BASIC SAFETY and ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

concepts.name: CISPR 11 Group 1 Class A emissions
concepts.evidence: Applicable standards and test methods: Mains terminal disturbance voltage... Group 1, Class A; Radiated disturbance... Group 1, Class A.

concepts.name: Representative model testing
concepts.evidence: The model F1417MCW was tested for representative model.

concepts.name: Voltage dips and interruptions recovery
concepts.evidence: Compliant - During the interruption, a power of EUT was turned off. But after the test, the EUT was recovered by operator’s intervention.

evidence.evidenceText: Report Number: NK-22-E-0810; Date of issue: 2022-10-04.

evidence.claim: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. prepared the test report and served as the CB testing laboratory.
evidence.evidenceText: Name of Testing Laboratory preparing the Report: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; CB Testing Laboratory: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant’s name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer: H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The tested product is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Test item description: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.

evidence.claim: The model/type references in the report are F1417MCW and A1417MCW.
F1417MCW was tested as the representative model.
evidence.evidenceText: The model F1417MCW was tested for representative model.
The product fulfils the requirements of IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015 IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020 and EN 60601-1-2:2015/A1:2021.

evidence.claim: The intended environment is a professional healthcare facility environment.
evidence.evidenceText: Intended ENVIRONMENT Professional healthcare facility environment.

evidence.claim: The intended use is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children, excluding mammography and direct cardiac application.
evidence.evidenceText: Intended use F1417MCW, A1417MCW series Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector are indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children... Not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.

evidence.claim: The detector rating is 3 A at 16 V or internally powered; the power supply box rating is 1.0 A, 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, Class I for DEPS9601.
evidence.evidenceText: Ratings: Detector: 3 A, 16 V or internally powered; Power Supply box: 1.0 A, 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, Cl. I (for model DEPS9601).

evidence.claim: The report identifies portable installation and use classification.
evidence.evidenceText: Classification of installation and use: Portable.

evidence.claim: The test item receipt date was 2022-09-05 and testing was performed from 2022-09-30 to 2022-10-03.
evidence.evidenceText: Date of receipt of test item: 2022-09-05; Date(s) of performance of tests: 2022-09-30 to 2022-10-03.

evidence.claim: The verdict summary shows pass results for listed IEC 60601-1-2 referenced emissions and immunity standards, with some standards marked not applicable.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60601-1-2 referenced emission standards... Terminal disturbance voltages CISPR 11... P; Radiation disturbance CISPR 11... P; AC-Mains Harmonics IEC 61000-3-2:2018 P; AC-Mains Voltage fluctuations and flicker IEC 61000-3-3:2013/AMD1:2017 P. IEC 60601-1-2 referenced immunity standards... ELECTROSTATIC DISCHARGE IEC 61000-4-2:2008 P...

evidence.claim: The EMC emission compliance class and group were Group 1 Class A.
evidence.evidenceText: IMMUNITY TEST LEVELS for each IMMUNITY test and EMISSIONS compliance class and group Group 1 Class A.

evidence.claim: Basic safety and essential performance criteria included intended image acquisition and normal operation while power was supplied during EMC testing.
evidence.evidenceText: Acquisition image is obtained as intended. The acquired image should not have two lines adjacent or be blank. Operation normally when operation is required. DC power is consistently supplied from POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed.

evidence.claim: The report states that test results relate only to the object tested.
evidence.evidenceText: The test results presented in this report relate only to the object tested.

reviewFlags.reason: No government regulator or market jurisdiction is identified; authorityOrJurisdiction is inferred from the testing laboratory and IECEE framework named in the report.
No explicit revision number is present; revisionOrVersion uses the report number NK-22-E-0810 for traceability.
The source contains repeated attachment pages and some OCR spacing/line-break artifacts, but key metadata and verdict text are readable.
The main report lists software version XAS_W 2.3 and Ezview 1.0, while the attached test plan also lists Firmware: 2.0; firmware is not captured in the document-level schema.
